mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( SELECT SYS_CD AS sysCd ,SYS_NM AS sysNm ,SYS_CD_DESC AS sysCdDesc ,CRG_MAN_NM AS crgManNm ,NONCORE_YN AS noncoreYn ,@rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
FROM TBSRSYSBS WHERE 1=1
AND SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND SYS_NM like CONCAT('%',#{sysNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND SYS_CD_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND CRG_MAN_NM like CONCAT('%',#{crgManNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND NONCORE_YN like CONCAT('%',#{noncoreYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by CRG_MAN_NM, SYS_CD ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM TBSRSYSBS WHERE 1=1
AND SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND SYS_NM like CONCAT('%',#{sysNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND SYS_CD_DESC like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdDesc, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND CRG_MAN_NM like CONCAT('%',#{crgManNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND NONCORE_YN like CONCAT('%',#{noncoreYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
SELECT SYS_CD AS sysCd ,SYS_NM AS sysNm ,SYS_CD_DESC AS sysCdDesc ,CRG_MAN_NM AS crgManNm ,NONCORE_YN AS noncoreYn FROM TBSRSYSBS WHERE SYS_CD = #{sysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBSRSYSBS WHERE SYS_CD = #{sysCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT EAI_IF_DATA_SEQ_NBR as ifDataSeq, EAI_IF_DATA_CRT_TMSTMP as ifDataCrtTmstmp, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_TP_CD as ifDataAplyTpCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD as ifDataAplyStsCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_TMSTMP as ifDataAplyTmstmp, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_ERR_CD as ifDataAplyErrCd, EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_ERR_MSG_CONT as ifDataAplyErrMsg, CD_DMN_LGCL_NM as dmnLgclNm, CD_DMN_PSCL_NM as dmnPsclNm, CD_DMN_CD_VAL as dmnCdVal, CD_DMN_CD_VAL_GLBL_NM as dmnCdValGlbl, CD_DMN_CD_VAL_LCAL_NM as dmnCdValLcal FROM TB_EAI_CD_DMN_CD_VAL_I WHERE (EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD = 'N' OR EAI_IF_DATA_APLY_STS_CD = 'E') AND (CD_DMN_PSCL_NM ='SYS_CD');
